action_descriptions.keep_dev_owned: The scripts/dev copy is still used by an active runtime path or dependency chain, so it should stay outside mirror auto-sync.
action_descriptions.keep_stable_owned: The scripts/stable copy is the launcher-facing owner for now; the drifted dev copy stays unmanaged until that feature area is retired or repointed.
action_descriptions.restore_mirror_from_stable: The drift looks low-risk to collapse later by re-aligning scripts/dev back to scripts/stable.
